rows.itemTitle: FRANCHISOR ASSISTANCE ADVERTISING COMPUTER SYSTEMS AND TRAINING
rows.summary: No substantive change in Item 11 between 2018 and 2023; text is functionally identical with only minor OCR, punctuation, and typographical corrections (e.g., 'm' → 'in', 'TOIF' → 'TOW', spacing, decimal points in section references). All substantive content—including pre-opening obligations, operational assistance, advertising program, computer system policy, manuals, and training structure/duration—remains unchanged.

rows.itemTitle: FRANCHISOR ASSISTANCE ADVERTISING COMPUTER SYSTEMS AND TRAINING
rows.summary: Training requirements are strengthened with earlier onboarding (within 3 days), added third-party online courses (business finance, accounting, OSHA 10), and expanded instructor team. Mandatory technology system is significantly expanded: NEW requires $6,000 Initial Technology Package (iPad Pro, Surface Go, wireless printer) versus OLD’s minimal hardware requirement ($2,000 PC estimate). Manuals reduced from 278 to 142 pages and now delivered digitally. Marketing Fee structure refined to include weekly + monthly cap; Local Marketing obligation newly introduced (up to 2% of Gross Sales/month). Data access language unchanged but now embedded in broader mandatory tech ecosystem.

You will also complete third-party online courses focused on managing and understanding business costs, margins, and financial statements, mastering accounting basics and accounting software training, and the OSHA 10 training program
